case_title: GUSTAVO OCON VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,283.00 FILED BY OCON, GUSTAVO AS TO DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-01-2018 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF OCON, GUSTAVO AS TO DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK CLAIM HEARING OF OCT-01-2019 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-01-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-17-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF GUSTAVO OCON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY CARLOS INFANTE, V.P. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT CAME TO AN AGREEMENT. IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE 10/17/2018 HEARING THE MATTER IS TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEPONENT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-17-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-01-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF GUSTAVO OCON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, IS PRESENT AND REPRESENTED BY CARLOS INFANTE. PER THE PLAINTIFF, THE PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO THE HEARING. IF THERE ARE NO APPEARANCES AT THE OCTOBER 01, 2019 HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
